strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React, directly aligning with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, Nest.js, React, Vitest). Over 6+ years in senior roles at companies like re:cinq, Optilyz, and RIDE Capital demonstrate deep expertise in end-to-end development.

Proven track record in AI-agent development and internal tooling, including contributions to MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and frameworks, addressing the job’s requirement for AI agent experience and developer tooling for enterprise automation.

Demonstrated leadership in architecture, scalability, and performance optimization, with experience in high-throughput systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby) and open-source projects like GISCollective, showcasing ability to design reliable, scalable solutions.
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, a key framework in the job description, though extensive Node.js experience suggests adaptability to similar backend frameworks.
German language proficiency is basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based team, though English fluency is strong and likely sufficient for technical communication.
Diverse experience across multiple languages (DLang, Java, Swift) may dilute focus on the primary stack, though this also highlights versatility and problem-solving adaptability.
response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a standout candidate for the Senior Fullstack Developer role, with over 6 years of senior-level experience in full-stack development, including direct alignment with the primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React) and secondary technologies (Java/Kotlin). His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at re:cinq demonstrates a strong fit for enterprise automation tooling, while his contributions to high-performance systems (e.g., micro-services at Dunnhumby) and open-source projects (GISCollective) highlight his ability to design scalable, reliable solutions. His customer-oriented focus, collaboration skills, and track record of optimizing development processes further underscore his suitability for the role.
